description: LLM-authored next experiment plan consumed by python -m src.train_loop_agent.

properties.hypothesis: Research hypothesis for the next run.
properties.rationale: Why this hypothesis follows from the leaderboard and latest report.
properties.changed_variables: Object containing the variables intentionally changed.
properties.fixed_variables: List of variables intentionally held fixed.

config_overrides.note: Only include small function/hyperparameter/training-condition changes. The script will preserve run_id and copy hypothesis.
